mainText:
Promo: "Experience the ultimate entitlement with Bank of Entitlement - where everything is yours for the taking!"

Visit Bank of Entitlement dot com for more.

ENTITLEMENT STORY: So, get this. I was at a fancy restaurant, living my best life as usual, when I noticed they were serving my favorite dish - lobster thermidor. Naturally, I demanded they bring me the entire platter for myself. But here's the kicker - they had run out of lobster! Can you believe it? Out of lobster! I threw a fit, demanded to see the manager, and ended up getting a full refund, a gift card, and a public apology from the chef. Who's the king of entitlement now? Me, that's who.
